title: Dried Ghast from Piglin Bartering
description: Chance to obtain the Dried Ghast from trading with Piglins! Useful for skyblock, oneblock and land limited worlds! Raise your own Happy Ghast!
body:
This is a simple mod that allows you to obtain the dried ghast from Piglin bartering.

Useful for skyblock, oneblock and land limited worlds!
Raise your own Happy Ghast!

Minecraft Versions 1.21.5 and below require backport mods like [Vanilla Backport](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanillabackport).

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/991c9eb9f1df1b66c5d3c4eff119fb317ac1c8c2_0.webp)
